content.content:
1	<script setup lang="ts">
2	import { ref, onMounted, computed } from 'vue'
3	import { useProgressStore } from '@/stores/progress'
4	import HeatmapChart from '@/components/dashboard/HeatmapChart.vue'
5	import RadarChart from '@/components/dashboard/RadarChart.vue'
6	import {
7	  Calendar,
8	  ChatDotRound,
9	  DocumentCopy,
10	  DataAnalysis,
11	  Download,
12	} from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
13	
14	const progressStore = useProgressStore()
15	
16	const currentYear = ref(new Date().getFullYear())
17	
18	onMounted(async () => {
19	  await Promise.all([
20	    progressStore.loadDashboard(),
21	    progressStore.loadHeatmap(currentYear.value),
22	    progressStore.loadRadar(),
23	  ])
24	})
25	
26	function handleYearChange(year: number) {
27	  currentYear.value = year
28	  progressStore.loadHeatmap(year)
29	}
30	
31	function handleExportReport() {
32	  progressStore.downloadReport()
33	}
34	
35	const statCards = computed(() => {
36	  const d = progressStore.dashboard
37	  return [
38	    {
39	      title: '学习天数',
40	      value: d?.totalDays ?? 0,
41	      unit: '天',
42	      icon: Calendar,
43	      color: '#409eff',
44	      bg: '#ecf5ff',
45	    },
46	    {
47	      title: '对话次数',
48	      value: d?.totalChats ?? 0,
49	      unit: '次',
50	      icon: ChatDotRound,
51	      color: '#67c23a',
52	      bg: '#f0f9eb',
53	    },
54	    {
55	      title: '代码片段',
56	      value: d?.totalSnippets ?? 0,
57	      unit: '个',
58	      icon: DocumentCopy,
59	      color: '#e6a23c',
60	      bg: '#fdf6ec',
61	    },
62	    {
63	      title: '知识覆盖率',
64	      value: d?.knowledgeCoverage ?? 0,
65	      unit: '%',
66	      icon: DataAnalysis,
67	      color: '#f56c6c',
68	      bg: '#fef0f0',
69	    },
70	  ]
71	})
72	
73	const yearOptions = computed(() => {
74	  const years: number[] = []
75	  const current = new Date().getFullYear()
76	  for (let y = current; y >= current - 3; y--) {
77	    years.push(y)
78	  }
79	  return years
80	})
